svg.title: SDE Framework v2 — 5-Case Supply Routing + Meta Pool Buffer + L3 Cascade Prevention [CORRECTED CASE D/E]
svg.desc: Corrected SDE 5-case routing: Case D = Dual-L4 cross-pool (zero supply + zero waitlist), Case E = Solo-L4 true defer (extreme edge, L4=1 entire system). Includes Meta Pool Buffer self-balancing math and L3 Cascade Prevention algorithm.
svg.text: SDE FRAMEWORK v2 — 5-CASE SUPPLY ROUTING | META POOL BUFFER | L3 CASCADE PREVENTION [CASE D/E CORRECTED]
Each L4 member = 1 SDE draw needed
Lower_pool = L1+L2 [+L3 if risk>1.0 or LPI>50%]
Full supply from existing active pools
SDE runs naturally — no meta pool
Priority: L1 oldest first → L2 oldest
Exits L3 now → stops L3→L4 cascade
Pulls from waitlist FIFO → temp buffer
deficit members exit as lower winners
Cross-pool: Pool A L4 + Pool B L4
Or same pool if it has 2+ L4 members
Oldest L4 per pool = upper winner
CONDITION: Total L4 = 1 in ENTIRE system
MUST NEVER happen in healthy system
= count of active pools with exactly 12 members
WORKED EXAMPLE (3 POOLS, 3 L4, 1 L1, WAITLIST=20)
total_draws = 3 pools | total_vacancies = 6 | lower_deficit = 3 L4 − 1 L1 = 2
meta_pool_size = MIN(20, 6 + 2) = 8 members pulled from waitlist FIFO
1. Existing L1 exits as lower winner (pool draw 1)
2. Meta pool member #1 exits as lower winner (pool draw 2) ← exits same as any pool winner
3. Meta pool member #2 exits as lower winner (pool draw 3)
4. 3 L4 members exit as upper winners (3 separate pool draws)
AT T+5M (META POOL DISTRIBUTES — FIFO OLDEST POOL FIRST):
Remaining = 8 pulled − 2 winners = 6 members redistribute to active pools
6 remaining → fill 6 vacancies (FIFO: oldest pool gets filled first)
These 6 are now L1 members in their assigned active pools. Meta pool label REMOVED.
RESULT: Meta pool DISSOLVED. Zero orphan members. Self-balancing. System fully refilled.
Remaining waitlist (20−8=12) stays in queue for Phase 1/2 normal processing next cycle.
CASCADE RISK SCORE = L3_count / MAX(L1+L2, 1) | Logged in Weekly Report alongside LPI
Priority: L3 first, then L2, L1
L3 MANDATORY: first partner for L4
Pair ALL available L3 with L4 first
REVISED LOWER-TIER SELECTION PRIORITY (SDE) — DEPENDS ON CASCADE RISK:
IF Risk ≤ 1.0 → L1 (oldest first) → L2 (oldest first) → L3 only if LPI >50%
IF Risk > 1.0 → L3 (oldest first) → L2 (oldest first) → L1 (oldest first) [anti-cascade mode]
IF Risk > 2.0 → L3 MANDATORY first partner for every L4. L1/L2 preserved as future supply buffer.
IF lower=0 AND waitlist>0 → CASE C (Meta Pool from waitlist)
IF lower=0 AND waitlist=0 AND L4≥2 → CASE D (Dual-L4 cross-pool — L5 prevention at all costs)
IF lower=0 AND waitlist=0 AND L4=1 → CASE E (True defer, max 1 week — should NEVER trigger)
APPROVED SUGGESTION: CASCADE_RISK score added to Weekly Report alongside LPI (week-over-week trend visible).
APPROVED SUGGESTION: "L3→L4 Pressure Forecast" widget shows how many current L3 become L4 next week.
APPROVED SUGGESTION: If Cascade Risk >1.5 for 3+ consecutive weeks → auto-trigger Priority L3 mode permanently until resolved.
Q2 — WINNER SELECTION WITHIN A DRAW:
Upper (L4): AI-weighted + Oldest L4 first (longest time at L4 = highest priority). Selected at T-2H. Revealed at T-0H.
Lower: Cascade Risk determines tier priority (see above). Within same tier: oldest member first.
Dual-L4 (Case D): Upper = oldest L4 system-wide. Lower = second-oldest L4 anywhere in system. Cross-pool allowed.
Lower-tier candidates are pulled from ANY pool system-wide (not restricted to the L4 member's own pool).
COMPLETE SDE FLOW — T-2H SELECTION → T-0H EXECUTION → T+5M CLEANUP
LPI → Cascade Risk → Flag L4 → Case A/B/C/D/E → [Case C: Meta Pool pulls from waitlist] → Stage winners in DB (hidden, not executed)
Phase 1: ALL draws computed (Ext-III + Ext-II + SDE staged + Regular for untouched pools) → Phase 2: ALL WINNERS REVEALED → Phase 3: Status+WIT tokens+vacancies
Meta pool remaining members → FIFO oldest pool first fills vacancies → Meta pool DISSOLVED → Phase 1/2/3 refill → SDE flags cleared → Draw lock released
GUARANTEES: At least 1 L4 exits every week. ALL 12-member pools draw every week. Winners revealed ONLY at T-0H Phase 2. WIT tokens ONLY AFTER reveal.

CASE D CORRECTED: Was "Dual-L4 only if same pool has 2+ L4". Corrected: Dual-L4 is CROSS-POOL. Pool A L4 (upper) + Pool B L4 (lower) — they exit from different pools. This handles total L4 saturation (Q-B answered).

CASE E CORRECTED: Was "SDE deferred to next week" when only 1 L4 in a pool. WRONG. True Case E = L4=1 in ENTIRE system, zero lower, zero waitlist. Physically cannot produce 2 winners. Should never trigger in healthy system with 10+ pools.
Normal draw (L4 upper + L1 lower): ₹5,500 + ₹2,000 = ₹7,500 ← cheapest
Case D Dual-L4 (L4 + L4): ₹5,500 + ₹5,500 = ₹11,000 ← more expensive now
Let L4 survive to L5: ₹6,500 next week + cascade pressure + system instability ← WORST
VERDICT: Pay ₹11,000 now (Case D) rather than risk L5 creation. L5 prevention is non-negotiable. The ₹3,500 premium is the cost of system integrity.
Bug #11: Current code triggers defer instead of Dual-L4. Must fix.
REWARD SCHEME CORE ENGINE v2.0 | SDE Framework v2 | Case D/E Corrected | Session: Soheb Khan User 2 / Sohebkhan.sk11 | 2026-06-14
